full_text:
Zhang Zheng
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Zheng. Ambushed by Du Yu but failed to report the defeat. Du Yu kindly informed Sun Hao and Zheng was sacked. Zhang Zheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
